examples.title: Basic Exception Handling Syntax
examples.explanation: Basic example showing try block monitors divide(), throw raises exception when b=0, catch block handles string exception

examples.title: Multiple Catch Blocks
examples.explanation: Multiple catch blocks handle different types; catch(...) catches any remaining type

examples.title: Custom Exception Class
examples.description: Creating user-defined exception derived from std::exception
examples.explanation: Custom exception class derives from std::exception, overrides what() method, used in BankAccount for withdrawal validation

examples.title: Stack Unwinding Demo
examples.explanation: When level3 throws, stack unwinds destroying l1, l2, l3 in order before catch handles exception

examples.title: Rethrowing Exception
examples.description: Demonstrates propagating exception to outer handler
examples.explanation: Inner catch catches, logs, then rethrows. Outer catch receives and handles the same exception
